seo.title: Casa Nel Verde | Authentic nature retreat
seo.description: Discover Casa Nel Verde: a peaceful stay in nature with direct WhatsApp and Telegram contact.

highlights.title: Why choose Casa Nel Verde
highlights.lead: Live the local experience, enjoy the garden, and rest in comfortable rooms.

cards.title: Authentic local experience
cards.description: Friendly hosts, homemade local food, amazing pizza, and their own local wine.

cards.title: Beautiful garden atmosphere
cards.description: Relax in the green garden area, including the mushroom table corner.

cards.title: Comfortable rooms for families
cards.description: Two rooms with king-size beds plus two extendable sofas for flexible sleeping options.

gallery.title: Photo gallery
gallery.lead: Preview the atmosphere of your next stay.

location.title: Strategic location
location.description: Casa Nel Verde is located just uphill from the beaches of Torremezzo di Falconara, combining sea views with a peaceful hillside setting.

amenities.title: Top amenities
amenities.lead: Everything you need for a comfortable and flexible stay.

cards.title: Fast Wi-Fi
cards.description: Reliable internet for remote work, streaming, and everyday use.

cards.title: Easy parking
cards.description: Comfortable parking options close to the property.

cards.title: Equipped kitchen
cards.description: Cook local ingredients and enjoy meals at your own pace.

cards.title: Private bathroom
cards.description: Clean and practical bathroom spaces for daily comfort.

cards.title: Flexible check-in
cards.description: Arrival options tailored to your travel timing.

cards.title: Short and long stays
cards.description: Ideal both for weekend escapes and extended rental periods.

cards.title: Friendly pricing
cards.description: Great value in relation to location, comfort, and hospitality.

backlinkPlatforms.title: Find us online
backlinkPlatforms.lead: Visit our profiles on major booking platforms.

finalCta.title: Ready for your next getaway?
finalCta.description: Message us now to check availability and rates.
